article_title: New Spinosaurus Species Unearthed in the Sahara Rewrites the Predatory Dinosaur's Inland History

content_preview.title: New Spinosaurus Species Unearthed in the Sahara Rewrites the Predatory Dinosaur's Inland History
content_preview.summary: Spinosaurus mirabilis, the first new spinosaurid species in over a century, has been identified from fossils in Niger's Sahara, challenging the view that these predators were coastal.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## A Century-Long Wait Ends in the Desert

A previously unknown species of spinosaurid dinosaur has been identified from fossils excavated in a remote region of Niger's central Sahara, marking the first new species in the spinosaurid family to be formally described in more than a century. The findings, [published in *Science*](https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2026/02/260222092251.htm) on February 23, 2026, introduce *Spinosaurus mirabilis* — a large, fish-eating predator distinguished by an...
